message:
Add TLS 1.3 support for HTTPS fetch

- Implement full TLS 1.3 handshake with proper length encoding
- Handle ChangeCipherSpec (type=20) compatibility records
- Skip NewSessionTicket post-handshake messages in recv()
- Handle close_notify alert for clean connection close
- Clean up DNS resolution with proper WasmEdge addrinfo structs
- Remove debug print statements and fix unused variable warnings
